description: Qoder platform, Kilo workflows, record-session task awareness
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(platform): add Qoder support as skills-based platform (.qoder/skills/)
- feat(record-session): enforce task archive check before recording; add --mode record for focused context output
- feat(record-session): sync record-session prompt across all 9 platforms
- feat(task): auto-commit after archive, add --no-commit flag

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(kilo): rename commands/feature/ to workflows/ to match Kilo official spec
- fix(iflow): add IFLOW_NON_INTERACTIVE check in session-start hook
- fix(multi-agent): clear CLAUDECODE env var to allow nested CLI launch
- fix(update): skip workflow.md and workspace/index.md during update (user-customizable content)

migrations.description: Kilo uses workflows/ instead of commands/feature/ per official spec
Remove empty commands/ directory after workflow migration

notes: Kilo users: run feature update to migrate commands/feature/ to workflows/. New Qoder platform available via --qoder flag.
